docket_entries.description: REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 05/30/2025. SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF. (RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,642.21 FILED BY BEAM, JEREMY ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT JOE, STACEY RENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $ 0.00 SERVED MAR-07-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOE, STACEY RENE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JEREMY ALLEN BEAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STACEY RENE JOE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
